originalFamilyScopeSummary: Rename branch-maintenance flow to update-branch and prefer rebase
currentTriggerSummary: pr-complete: Rename branch-maintenance flow to update-branch and prefer rebase
notes: This pr-complete follow-up resolved the independent review on PR #320 for the update-branch rename. Fixed the 1 blocking defect (manual/Jira-rooted update-branch chains threw 'Invalid PR reference' — now convert ticketOrPr to owner/repo#N for all PR_BOUND_FLOW_TYPES) and 5 of 6 nits (dropped speculative resolveBranchUpdateStrategy and wired isBranchUpdateStrategy; corrected 'threaded into prepare' doc comments; aligned report artifact naming to report.md across contract/docs/spec; added CHANGELOG entries incl. BREAKING protocol note; normalized companion persisted flow filter). Nit #7 (slotRelease reformatting) waived with evidence: single-line form is 113 chars and fails prettier printWidth:100 on main, so the wrap is mandated. Validation: full command-center + companion typecheck pass, protocol tests pass, full gateway suite 174 files/0 failures (added a regression test for the blocking fix), eslint + prettier clean on all changed files. No open review findings remain; the original rename scope is complete and its follow-up defects are closed.
